---
title: "Descriptive Analytics and Data Exploration Review"
subtitle: "Profiling, Distributions, Missingness, Subgroups, Anomalies, and Analytical Questions"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    number-sections: true
execute:
  echo: true
  warning: false
  message: false
---

## Dataset profile

State the dataset, variables, unit of analysis, time coverage, and expected domains.

## Descriptive summaries

Report counts, missingness, distributions, categories, and subgroup summaries.

## Reproducible example

```{python}
values = [120, 128, 95, 102, 180, 196, 140, 155, 72, 75, 61, 500]
mean_value = sum(values) / len(values)
median_value = sorted(values)[len(values)//2]
print({"mean": mean_value, "median": median_value})
```

## Exploration questions

Preserve questions generated by patterns, anomalies, missingness, and subgroup differences.

## Appendix

Preserve profile records, checks, questions, and generated summaries.
